common.offline: You are offline. Data will sync when you reconnect.
common.demoBadge: Demo mode — connect Supabase to save data

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change it anytime in Settings

onboarding.slide1Desc: Take a photo and instantly get carbs, sugar and calories.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Log values in seconds and see your trends clearly.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Understand your doses with informational AI estimates.
onboarding.slide4Desc: Ask anything about diabetes, food and lifestyle.
onboarding.slide5Desc: Share clear PDF reports with your doctor.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your journey
auth.registerSubtitle: Start managing your diabetes with AI
auth.name: Full name
auth.resetSent: Reset link sent to your email.
auth.securityNote:
Your data is secure and protected.
We use state-of-the-art encryption.

wizard.personalSub: This information helps us personalize your experience.
wizard.personalInfoNote: Your data is secure and handled confidentially.
wizard.diabetesTitle: What type of diabetes do you have?
wizard.insulinSub: Choose the option that fits you best.
wizard.carbRatioSub: How many grams of carbs does 1 unit of insulin cover?
wizard.carbRatioHint: Grams of carbs covered by 1 unit of insulin
wizard.correctionSub: How much does 1 unit lower your glucose (mg/dl)?
wizard.correctionHint: How much 1 unit lowers your glucose (mg/dL)
wizard.targetSub: Set your target range for better guidance.
wizard.targetInfoNote: A personalized target range helps you better understand your glucose and live healthier.
wizard.emergencySub: This contact will be notified in case of emergency.
wizard.emergencyInfoNote: In an emergency, we can quickly reach this person to help you best.
wizard.doctorSub: Add your doctor to better coordinate your care.
wizard.doctorInfoTitle: No worries, your data is secure.
wizard.doctorInfoNote: Your information is handled confidentially and never shared without your consent.
wizard.finishDesc: GlucoAI is ready to help you every day.

home.greetingSub: Take care of your health today
home.noMeals: No meals yet. Scan your first meal!
home.noGlucoseToday: No glucose today — add your reading
home.scanDesc: AI analysis to estimate calories and nutrients
home.injectionSub: Calculate your bolus or add a dose
home.timelineEmpty: Your readings, meals and injections for today will appear here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: What your AI coach detected
notifications.coachSub: The good and the not-so-good — every event is recorded here, in order.
notifications.emptyMessage: Add a reading, meal or activity — I'll start keeping your journal.

reminders.glucoseBodyDefault: Daily reminder to check your glucose.
reminders.glucoseReasonLearned: Time learned from your usual readings
reminders.insulinReason: Time learned from your long-acting injections
reminders.breakfastBody: Scan your breakfast to track your carbs.
reminders.breakfastReason: You often log a meal in the morning
reminders.eveningBody: Glucose, meals and injections of the day.

insights.hypoBody: {{value}} mg/dL — take 15 g of fast sugar (3 pieces) and re-measure in 15 minutes.
insights.hyperBody: {{value}} mg/dL — drink water and consider a correction with the bolus calculator.
insights.postMealBody: Your meal "{{food}}" has a high glycemic index — now is a good time to check your glucose.
insights.sugarBody: {{grams}} g of sugar consumed — favor low-GI foods for the rest of the day.
insights.greatBody: {{percent}}% of your readings are in range ({{low}}–{{high}}). Keep it up!
insights.activityBody: Well done on your {{min}} min of activity! Exercise can lower glucose for several hours — watch for signs of hypo.
insights.fastingBody: Measure your fasting glucose — it's the reference point for your day.
insights.noMeasureBody: Add at least one reading to track your trend for the day.
insights.scanNextBody: Photograph your plate to estimate carbs and calculate your bolus automatically.
insights.upToDateBody: {{glucose}} reading(s), {{meals}} meals logged today. Keep up your regular tracking!

activityScreen.subtitle: Move every day for better health
